queries.q: Estimate the TAM, SAM, and SOM for the AI meeting-notes category before we pitch this to the board
How big is the addressable market for mid-market expense-management tools?
We're deciding whether to enter the vertical SaaS space for dental clinics; size the opportunity
Triangulate a market size for our new developer-tools line using top-down and bottom-up methods
Investors want a defensible market-size number for the Series B deck; give me a calibrated range
Size the obtainable market for our product in the EU over the next three years
We're deciding go or no-go on this new category; what's the realistic market opportunity?
Use comparable-company data to estimate how big this market could get
Give me the market-sizing section for the annual strategy deck, TAM down to SOM
How much revenue is actually available to us in the SMB segment of this market?
Compare our product against the three main competitors on features and pricing
queries.notes: Competitive positioning, not market size, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Break down where we win and lose against the category leader
Map the competitive landscape for this space, direct and indirect players
Rank these ten expansion-market candidates so we know which to size first
queries.notes: Ranking a candidate list, not sizing one market, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: We don't even know who the target buyer is yet for this category; help me figure that out first
queries.notes: Target customer not yet identified, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Fix this flaky Cypress test that only fails in CI
Write a Terraform module for an S3 bucket with versioning enabled
Suggest a birthday present for a 10 year old who likes robots
